company_name: LG Energy Solution initial LFP $4.3B contract disclosure cap
evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for BATTERY_CONTRACT_DISCLOSURE_CONFIDENCE; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: Initial 2025 disclosure value and duration support Stage 2, but customer and use-case were undisclosed then, so Stage 3-Green must be capped. Sources: round_161.md Reuters LGES $4.3B LFP contract.

evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for ESS_TESLA_MEGAPACK_SUPPLY_CHAIN; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: The same $4.3B LFP contract becomes a stronger Stage 2 candidate once Tesla Megapack 3 and Lansing production are confirmed, but ramp-up, utilization, ESS OPM, and FCF remain required. Sources: round_161.md Reuters Tesla-LGES Megapack 3 Lansing confirmation.

evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for ESS_LFP_GRID_STORAGE; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: GWh and duration support Stage 2, but missing contract value caps EPS/FCF and Green credit. Sources: round_161.md Reuters SK On Flatiron ESS deal.

evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for EV_TO_ESS_CAPACITY_REDEPLOYMENT; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: EV CAPA can become hard 4C while a separate ESS conversion remains only a Watch candidate. Sources: round_161.md Reuters GM-LG Ohio battery plant.

company_name: SK On-Ford battery JV dissolution and ESS pivot watch
evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for EV_BATTERY_JV_RESTRUCTURING; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: JV dissolution can reduce fixed-cost drag and create an ESS pivot option, but EV-demand weakness and operating losses keep it Watch. Sources: round_161.md Reuters SK On Ford JV dissolution.

company_name: Ford Energy ESS and AI data-center storage pivot
evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for ESS_AI_DATA_CENTER_STORAGE; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: Ford Energy is a useful AI data-center storage pivot reference, but exact source date, customer contracts, margins, and FCF remain unverified. Sources: round_161.md Financial Times Ford Energy storage pivot.

evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for EV_CAPA_CONTRACT_CANCELLATION; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
false_positive_reason: contract_cancelled; ev_model_discontinued; expected_revenue_loss; write_down_19_5b; policy_shift; ev_demand_slowdown
notes: Long-term EV battery supply contracts are not automatically Green if customer EV strategy changes. Sources: round_161.md Reuters Ford LGES contract cancellation.

evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for EV_CAPA_CONTRACT_CANCELLATION; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: A multi-trillion-won EV battery order can still be 4C if the customer cancels and expected revenue disappears. Sources: round_161.md LGES-Freudenberg contract cancellation.

evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for BATTERY_RECYCLING_ESS_SHIFT; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: Recycling gets stronger when recovered metals, ESS/grid services, data-center demand, and customers connect. Sources: round_161.md Reuters Redwood recycling funding.

company_name: Second-life battery grid storage SOH validation reference
evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for SECOND_LIFE_BATTERY_GRID_STORAGE; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: Second-life storage can become useful grid evidence only when SOH, safety, warranty, and customer contracts are independently validated. Sources: round_161.md second-life battery grid storage SOH guardrail.

company_name: Battery graphite supply security with cost risk
evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for BATTERY_GRAPHITE_SUPPLYCHAIN_SECURITY; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: China dependency makes graphite strategically important, but US cost, policy financing, and offtake must be validated before Green. Sources: round_161.md arXiv graphite battery supply security.

evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for WASTE_RECYCLING_ENVIRONMENT; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: Waste treatment is R3's clearest Green-capable infrastructure reference when permits, volume, and recurring FCF are visible. Sources: round_161.md Reuters EQT KJ Environment platform.

evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for HYDROGEN_FUEL_CELL_INFRA; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: Actual CAPEX is stronger than policy talk, but customers, utilization, and OP conversion are still required. Sources: round_161.md Reuters Hyundai hydrogen fuel-cell plant.

evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for SOLAR_TARIFF_SUPPLYCHAIN; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: Solar subsidy and US manufacturing narrative can break when customs and component supply stop production. Sources: round_161.md Reuters Qcells customs detention.

evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for RENEWABLE_ENERGY_PROJECT_ECONOMICS; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: Renewable policy and PPAs cannot overcome project economics when rates, foundations, and delay create impairment. Sources: round_161.md Reuters Orsted Sunrise Wind impairment.

evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for LITHIUM_ESS_DEMAND_CYCLE; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: Lithium rebound is not structural Green without cost curve, offtake, FCF, and CAPEX discipline. Sources: round_161.md Reuters lithium prices after crash.

evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for LITHIUM_ESS_DEMAND_CYCLE; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: ESS can improve lithium demand, but lithium miners remain cycle/Watch until FCF and supply response are controlled. Sources: round_161.md Reuters energy storage lithium demand.

company_name: Sodium-ion substitution pressure on lithium/LFP economics
evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for SODIUM_ION_SUBSTITUTION_OVERLAY; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: Sodium-ion is a price-ceiling and substitution overlay for lithium/LFP cases, not a positive Green target. Sources: round_161.md Reuters lithium ESS demand sodium-ion risk.

company_name: Korea EV battery certification and fire risk
evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for EV_FIRE_BESS_SAFETY_OVERLAY; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: EV fire and battery disclosure should become a separate RedTeam overlay for battery, charging, and ESS candidates. Sources: round_161.md Reuters Korea EV battery certification.

company_name: Moss Landing BESS fire safety and permitting overlay
evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for BESS_SAFETY_PERMITTING; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: Large BESS demand can be offset by fire, permitting, insurance, and local-safety risk; exact stage date needs backfill. Sources: round_161.md Guardian Moss Landing battery storage fire.

company_name: Battery SOH transparency and second-life risk
evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for BATTERY_SOH_SECOND_LIFE_TRANSPARENCY; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: Second-life and recycling economics can be overstated when SOH and residual capacity are not independently validated. Sources: round_161.md arXiv battery health validation.

evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for SOLID_STATE_COMMERCIALIZATION_LICENSE; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: A solid-state license can be Stage 2, but Green waits for production, vehicle adoption, royalty revenue, cost, and yield. Sources: round_161.md Reuters Volkswagen QuantumScape solid-state license.

evidence_summary: Round161 R3 Loop-10 case for SPECULATIVE_BATTERY_TECH; EV growth, ESS contracts, recycling economics, and green-policy risks remain separated.
notes: Solid-state and new battery materials stay Watch/Red until commercialization, customers, production, margin, and FCF are proven. Sources: round_161.md speculative battery technology guardrail.
